title: Implementing a High-Performance, Distributed Rate Limiter using Node.js Worker Threads
constraints: Must use the worker_threads module to offload the rate limiting logic.
Must utilize a mock database to store the request counts.
Must handle concurrent updates to the cache to prevent data inconsistency.
Must respond within 50ms for 100 concurrent requests.

endpoints.description: Returns the number of remaining requests for the given IP address.
Increments the request count for the given IP address.
